## Checklist

- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes with no errors
- [ ] Theme registered in category `index.ts` and `src/registry.ts`
- [ ] Skin includes banner art, border style, and decorations
- [ ] Palette has all required color fields with good contrast
- [ ] Both professional and immersive companions are defined
- [ ] No offensive or discriminatory content
